value.found_quote: Connections are managed directly through the built-in MCP Store. 1. **Access the Store:** Open the MCP Store panel within the "..." dropdown at the top of the editor's side panel. 2. **Browse & Install:** Select any of the supported servers from the list and click Install. 3. **Authenticate:** Follow the on-screen prompts to securely link your accounts (where applicable).
value.rationale: The page describes a built-in MCP Store within the Antigravity editor that allows browsing, installing, and authenticating supported MCP servers directly, matching the claim. It is presented as a current feature with no indication of deprecation.
